hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json,sys,subprocess
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command','')
if 'git' in cmd and 'commit' in cmd:
    r=subprocess.run(['git','diff','--cached','--name-only'],capture_output=True,text=True,cwd='/home/pi/projects/home-assistant-claude-code')
    if 'claude-code-ui/config.yaml' not in r.stdout:
        print(json.dumps({'systemMessage':'Reminder: bump the version in claude-code-ui/config.yaml before committing.'}))
"
